choices.text: var counter = 0. Without var: reinitialized each bar; counter never grows. With var: initialized once; persists. Use := for reassignment: `counter := counter + 1`. Standard for accumulators, state, persistent tracking across bars.

questions.prompt: Want user to set indicator period (default 14)?

choices.text: input.int(). `length = input.int(14, 'Length', minval=1)`. Appears in settings UI; users adjust. input.float(), input.bool(), input.string(), input.color() for other types. Pro pattern: all tunable values via input(); never hardcode. Users customize per asset/timeframe.
